description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It helps YouTubers, Instagram creators, and other digital content producers edit, caption, and publish videos faster using AI.

policies.details: No refunds are available after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within 7 days will be processed within 5-7 business days.
24/7 live support is available exclusively for Pro Plan subscribers. Basic Plan users receive email support with responses within 24-48 hours.
Subscriptions are billed monthly. Annual plans are not currently available. You can cancel anytime before your next billing cycle.
Video limits reset on the 1st of each month. Unused videos do not roll over to the next month.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade to Pro at any time. The price difference will be prorated for the current billing period.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports exports for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Twitter/X. Direct publishing integration is available on the Pro plan.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, new users get a 7-day free trial of the Pro Plan. No credit card required to start the trial.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream accepts MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV as input. Exports are delivered in MP4 format.
